hypothesis:
## Novel Hypothesis

Incorporating dynamic, property-dependent constraint weighting (where α₁ and α₂ in Equation 4 are learned functions of target properties y* rather than fixed hyperparameters) will enable PCDiff to adaptively balance physical feasibility and compositional diversity across different regions of the property space, thereby improving coverage for extreme property targets (e.g., ultra-high strength or ultra-high conductivity composites) where fixed regularization weights may over-constrain the generative process.
